The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Detestable Reservoir

Klaxons mimic panicked breaths.
Silence weighs with intent.
Madness prices true star sights.
AI heralds doom fusion.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • East and West dead end
  • North leads to stairs 2 down
  • Go back North
  • Both ways dead end._.
  • East dead end
  • how much further?
